clarified_problem: Engineer a production-minded Python service for: Enhance the existing URL shortener with expiring links and richer analytics without breaking existing redirect behavior.
ambiguities: Analytics granularity and retention policy are not specified.
assumptions: REST APIs will be exposed via FastAPI.
SQLite is used for prototype persistence; production can use Postgres.
No authentication is required for MVP demo endpoints.
Backward compatibility for existing API contracts must be preserved.

tasks.title: Assess Existing System
tasks.description: Assess existing modules and define an incremental change strategy that preserves behavior.

ai_assist.prompt: Summarize existing architecture and identify safe extension points.
ai_assist.expected_ai_output: Draft implementation artifacts that require engineer review before acceptance.

tasks.engineer_validation: Review impact radius and confirm compatibility constraints are explicit.

tasks.title: Define API Contracts
tasks.description: Define request/response schemas and endpoint behavior including error contracts.

ai_assist.prompt: Generate OpenAPI-aligned endpoint contracts and error responses for this requirement.
ai_assist.expected_ai_output: Draft implementation artifacts that require engineer review before acceptance.

tasks.engineer_validation: Review schema correctness, naming clarity, and backward compatibility constraints.

tasks.title: Design Persistence
tasks.description: Model entities and storage access patterns for required system data.

ai_assist.prompt: Draft SQLAlchemy models and data access boundaries for required entities.
ai_assist.expected_ai_output: Draft implementation artifacts that require engineer review before acceptance.

tasks.engineer_validation: Verify indexes, uniqueness, nullability, and migration impact.

tasks.title: Implement URL Core Flows
tasks.description: Implement URL creation, redirect, metadata retrieval, and stats endpoints.

ai_assist.prompt: Generate handler/service code for URL creation, redirect, metadata, and stats.
ai_assist.expected_ai_output: Draft implementation artifacts that require engineer review before acceptance.

tasks.engineer_validation: Manually verify behavior for successful, missing, and expired link flows.

tasks.title: Implement Analytics Capture
tasks.description: Capture click analytics fields including timestamp, referrer, user-agent, and anonymized IP hash.

ai_assist.prompt: Generate analytics event capture logic and privacy-aware data handling.
ai_assist.expected_ai_output: Draft implementation artifacts that require engineer review before acceptance.

tasks.engineer_validation: Verify click count integrity and ensure no raw client IP is stored.

tasks.title: Add Tests
tasks.description: Add unit and integration tests covering happy paths, edge cases, and regressions.

ai_assist.prompt: Generate pytest cases for success paths, error handling, and regressions.
ai_assist.expected_ai_output: Draft implementation artifacts that require engineer review before acceptance.

tasks.engineer_validation: Run tests and confirm behavior-level assertions, not just status-code assertions.

tasks.title: Document Design and Risks
tasks.description: Document assumptions, design trade-offs, and operational limitations.

ai_assist.prompt: Draft architecture notes including scaling, security, and maintainability trade-offs.
ai_assist.expected_ai_output: Draft implementation artifacts that require engineer review before acceptance.

tasks.engineer_validation: Confirm documentation aligns with implemented behavior and known limitations.

artifacts.task_summary: T0: Assess Existing System | T1: Define API Contracts | T2: Design Persistence | T3: Implement URL Core Flows | T4: Implement Analytics Capture | T5: Add Tests | T6: Document Design and Risks
test_plan: Validate link creation with valid/invalid URLs.
Validate redirect flow and click counter increments.
Validate stats endpoint reflects click totals.
Validate expired link handling returns HTTP 410.
Add regression tests for unchanged legacy behavior.
artifacts.documentation: This prototype demonstrates AI-assisted requirement interpretation, task decomposition, artifact generation, and validation while preserving engineer ownership of outputs.
generated_outputs: Code implementation updates in API, service, and persistence layers
API contract definitions using FastAPI/Pydantic schemas
Pytest integration tests for health, redirect behavior, expiry handling, and engineering pipeline
ai_execution_notes: Each task defines a bounded AI prompt and expected output.
Engineer validates correctness before accepting generated outputs.
Validation stage records quality checks and risks before final acceptance.
artifacts.requirement: Enhance the existing URL shortener with expiring links and richer analytics without breaking existing redirect behavior.

checks: All core artifact sections are present.
Test plan includes multiple functional and edge-path validations.
AI-assisted execution notes are present for engineer review traceability.
Task dependency graph is internally consistent.
risks: AI-generated tasks can miss hidden constraints unless manually reviewed.
Performance and abuse protection controls are not production-complete in this prototype.
